metadata.title: Find orphaned files and broken links
metadata.description: Find orphaned files and broken links Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: outerHTML
setDesc
ast.source: Indent lines to disable the link and to clean up the graph view
ast.target: 缩进行以禁用链接并清理图表视图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to exclude files in the given directories. Disable to only include files in the given directories
ast.target: 启用以排除给定目录中的文件。禁用以仅包含给定目录中的文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add each directory path in a new line
ast.target: 在新行中添加每个目录路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add each file path in a new line (with file extension!)
ast.target: 在新行中添加每个文件路径（带文件扩展名！）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude files, which contain the given file as link. Add each file path in a new line (with file extension!). Set it to `*` to exclude files with links.
ast.target: 排除包含给定文件作为链接的文件。在新行中添加每个文件路径（带文件扩展名！）。将其设置为 `*` 以排除带有链接的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to exclude files with the given filetypes. Disable to only include files with the given filetypes
ast.target: 启用以排除具有给定文件类型的文件。禁用以仅包含具有给定文件类型的文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Effect depends on toggle above
ast.target: 效果取决于上方的开关

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude files, which contain the given tag. Add each tag separated by comma (without `#`)
ast.target: 排除包含给定标签的文件。用逗号分隔每个标签（不带 `#`）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add each filetype separated by comma. Set to `*` to delete all files.
ast.target: 用逗号分隔每个文件类型。设置为 `*` 以删除所有文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude links in the specified file. Add each file path in a new line (with file extension!)
ast.target: 排除指定文件中的链接。在新行中添加每个文件路径（带文件扩展名！）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude links with the specified filetype. Add each filetype separated by comma
ast.target: 排除具有指定文件类型的链接。用逗号分隔每个文件类型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude links in files, which contain the given tag. Add each tag separated by comma (without `#`)
ast.target: 排除包含给定标签的文件中的链接。用逗号分隔每个标签（不带 `#`）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude the specific files. Add each file path in a new line (with file extension!)
ast.target: 排除特定文件。在新行中添加每个文件路径（带文件扩展名！）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude files in the specified directories. Add each directory path in a new line
ast.target: 排除指定目录中的文件。在新行中添加每个目录路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you like this Plugin, consider donating to support continued development.
ast.target: 如果您喜欢此插件，请考虑捐赠以支持持续开发。

ast.source: Open output file
ast.target: 打开输出文件

ast.target: 输出文件名

ast.target: 禁用工作链接

ast.target: 排除给定目录中的文件

ast.name: setName

ast.target: 查找孤立文件
